_note: Use admin.html to generate new entries. STILL-UNVERIFIED placeholders (dates/details are guesses): kibler-valley-river-run-2026, stuart-farmers-market, dehart-summer-concert-jul-2026, fairy-stone-hunt-jul-2026, reynolds-lawn-concert-aug-2026, primland-stargazing-aug-2026, trunk-or-treat-2026, veterans-day-2026, christmas-parade-2026. Everything else is verified from an official source.

events.title: CANCELED: Kibler Valley River Run
events.description: The 43rd annual river run has been canceled for 2026. Drought conditions left the Pinnacles Hydro Plant unable to provide the water release the Dan River run depends on, per the Red Bank Ruritan Club. Organizers hope to bring it back in 2027.

events.title: Stuart Farmers' Market
events.description: Local produce, meats, eggs, baked goods, and crafts from Patrick County farms and makers. Every Friday morning through October.

events.title: Rotary on Tap: Pints for PCHS Teachers
events.description: Grab a pint with the Rotary Club of Stuart and support Patrick County High School teachers. A casual evening social — everyone welcome.

events.title: Rural Everywhere: Chamber & Rotary Joint Meeting
events.description: The Patrick County Chamber of Commerce and Rotary Club of Stuart host a joint community event on connecting communities. Open to the public.

events.title: Summer Concert Series at DeHart Park
events.description: Bring a lawn chair for an evening of live music at DeHart Park. Concessions available; kids' playground on site.

events.title: Guided Fairy Stone Hunt & Junior Ranger Day
events.description: Ranger-led hunt for the famous staurolite 'fairy stone' crosses, plus Junior Ranger activities for kids. Meet at the park office.

events.title: 44th Annual Beach Music Festival
events.description: Three days of beach music at Wayside Park, hosted by the Rotary Club of Stuart. The 2026 lineup featured The Embers, Jim Quick & Coastline, The Tams, and The Swingin' Medallions, with camping on site. Back for year 45 in 2027 — dates announced at beachfestival.com.

events.title: Lawn Concert at Reynolds Homestead
events.description: Evening concert on the lawn of the historic Reynolds Homestead. Picnics welcome; tours of the 1843 home before the show.

events.title: Hall Hammerheads Annual Golf Tournament
events.description: Annual golf tournament benefiting Hammerheads youth baseball — prizes, games, and lunch at Gordon Trent Golf Course in the Blue Ridge foothills.

events.title: Wayfest 2026 — Free Concert & Community Event
events.description: A free concert and community celebration at Dominion Valley Park. Live music, food, and family fun — no ticket required.

events.title: Stargazing at the Primland Observatory
events.description: Guided night-sky viewing from Primland's mountaintop observatory — some of the darkest skies in Virginia. Reservations required.

events.title: Demolition Derby
events.description: Crashing, smashing, engine-revving fun as the Rotary Club of Stuart hosts the annual Demolition Derby. Concessions on site.

events.title: Homestead Artisan Series: Indigo Shibori
events.description: Hands-on indigo shibori dyeing workshop, part of the Homestead Artisan Series highlighting traditional and historic crafts and folk arts of the region.

events.title: Front Porch Fest 17
events.description: Four days of music and camping at Spirithaven Farm, headlined by Shinyribs with Chalk Dinosaur, Jon Stickley Trio, Big Daddy Love, Tae & The Neighborly, and two dozen more acts. Family-friendly, rain or shine, hosted by One Family Productions. Gates open 1 PM Thursday; 9 AM Friday through Sunday.

events.title: Patrick County Agricultural Fair
events.description: Fair week in Patrick County: livestock shows, exhibits, carnival rides, fair food, and small-town fun at Rotary Field, hosted by the Rotary Club of Stuart.

events.title: Apple Dumpling Festival
events.description: Fall festival in downtown Stuart with fresh apple dumplings, craft and food vendors, live music, and kids' activities.

events.title: Trunk or Treat
events.description: Safe family trick-or-treating from decorated trunks downtown. Costume contest and candy for the kids.

events.title: Veterans Day Ceremony
events.description: Community ceremony honoring Patrick County veterans, with color guard, guest speakers, and taps at the eleventh hour.

events.title: Stuart Christmas Parade
events.description: Floats, fire trucks, marching bands, and Santa himself rolling down Main Street to kick off the Christmas season.

events.title: Board of Supervisors Business Meeting
events.venue: Veterans Memorial Administration Building, 106 Rucker St
events.description: Regular business meeting of the Patrick County Board of Supervisors in the third-floor board chamber. Open to the public.
